subject: Cannot login to my account
body: I have been unable to login for the past 2 hours. I keep getting an 'Invalid credentials' error even after resetting my password multiple times. I need access urgently for an important client presentation this afternoon.

subject: Overcharged on my monthly bill
body: I was charged $299 this month but my subscription is $99/month. I need this refund processed immediately as it has caused an overdraft on my bank account and I am being charged fees.

subject: How do I export reports to Excel?
body: I would like to know the steps to export my monthly reports to Excel format. Is there a way to schedule automatic exports? Thank you.

subject: URGENT - Entire platform down for all 50 users
body: CRITICAL: Our entire team of 50 people cannot access the platform at all. We are losing thousands of dollars per hour. We have a major client demo in 90 minutes and absolutely nothing works. Please escalate immediately!

subject: Profile picture not updating after upload
body: I uploaded a new profile picture 3 days ago but it still shows my old one on the dashboard. It is a minor issue but wanted to report it so you are aware.

subject: Account suspended without any warning or notice
body: My account was suspended without any prior notice or explanation. I have 3 years of critical business data stored and I cannot access any of it. I need this resolved today or I will have to escalate to my legal team.

subject: Dashboard very slow on Firefox browser
body: The main dashboard takes about 10 to 15 seconds to load when using Firefox. Chrome and Edge work fine. I am running Firefox 126.0 on Windows 11. It has been happening for about a week.

subject: Wrong company name on invoice for tax purposes
body: The invoice I received last month shows the wrong company name. It shows 'Acme Corp Ltd' but it should be 'Acme Corporation'. This is causing issues with our tax documentation and accountant.
